session.assistant:
make failed: 1 issue found
**Ruff Linting Error:**
File: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/land_cmd.py:14:1` Rule: `I001` (Import block is un-sorted or un-formatted) Message: Import block is un-sorted or un-formatted - 1 fixable with the `--fix` option
**Summary:** - Prettier: 2 formatting warnings in markdown files (non-blocking) - Ruff: 1 import sorting violation in `land_cmd.py` - Type checking (ty): All checks passed - Unit tests (erk): 5939 passed - Unit tests (erk-dev): 136 passed - Unit tests (erk-statusline): 115 passed - Unit tests (erk-mcp): 24 passed (output truncated)
The Prettier warnings are in documentation files and do not fail the build. The blocking failure is the import sorting issue in `src/erk/cli/commands/land_cmd.py` at line 14, which can be fixed with `ruff check --fix`.
